title: Luffy Is Trapped Inside Nola
description: Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Luffy, Eneru, Nola, Usopp, Enel. Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: That really sucks for you guys....!!

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: You got swallowed by the snake!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Women of the Blue Sea are terrifying!

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: That's it, Moan as you wish!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Hold on, Aisa! Don't get digested!

summary: Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.
